ddls:
CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the article */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body content of the article */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the article */,
  "site_url" TEXT /* URL to the article on the original site */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the article was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the article was last updated */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the article has received */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the article has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the article has received */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the article */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language of the article */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who authored the article */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL of the article's thumbnail image */,
  "summary" TEXT /* A brief summary of the article */,
  "is_sponsored" INTEGER /* Indicates if the article is sponsored */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Indicates if the article is featured */,
  "seo_keywords" TEXT /* SEO keywords for the article */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the article is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., NewsBTC, CoinDesk) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the source's logo */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "is_reliable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the source is considered reliable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "locale" TEXT /* Locale code for the language */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Writing direction (e.g., LTR, RTL) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the language is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., US, Europe) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the region */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the region is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or description */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the article */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date and time the article was viewed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to view the article */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who viewed the article */,
  "view_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the view in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_views_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction event */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being interacted with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user interacting with the article */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., like, dislike, comment) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the interaction */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_interactions_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (if this is a reply) */,
  "is_moderated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is moderated */,
  "moderation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for moderation */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is deleted */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "article_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the article */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "version_content" TEXT /* Content of the article in this version */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the editor who made the changes */,
  "is_published" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is published */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_versions_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_article_versions_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the action (e.g., web, API) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new article, comment, like) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "notification_content" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was read */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification is read */,
  "is_dismissed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification is dismissed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "key_value" TEXT /* Value of the API key */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the API key */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the API key was created */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date and time the API key was last used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the API key (e.g., active, revoked) */,
  "last_ip" TEXT /* Last IP address used with the API key */,
  "rate_limit" INTEGER /* Rate limit for the API key */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "integration_name" TEXT /* Name of the integration */,
  "integration_url" TEXT /* URL of the external service */,
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the API key used for the integration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Date and time of the last sync with the external service */,
  "sync_status" TEXT /* Status of the last sync */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_api_key_id FOREIGN KEY ("api_key_id") REFERENCES api_keys ("api_key_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose preference it is */,
  "preference_key" TEXT /* Key of the preference (e.g., language, region) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the preference is the default setting */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
